description: Ticket format/location validation and canonical .workaholic/ layout enforcement (PostToolUse safeguard; layout gate warns by default, blocks under WORKAHOLIC_STRICT_LAYOUT or a .workaholic/.strict-layout marker), the structural guard that blocks non-canonical ticket moves plus two git gates that block off-policy commit subjects and off-pattern branch creation (PreToolUse Bash, blocking), and the always-on engineering-policy lens for workflow commands (UserPromptSubmit, non-blocking)
